sn1.17:1.2: the contemplative life is hard to do, hard to endure,
sn1.17:1.3: for	many are the confinements there
sn1.17:2.1: How many days can you follow
sn1.17:2.2: the contemplative life if you don’t block the mind?
sn1.17:2.4: under the sway of your resolves.
sn1.17:3.1: As a tortoise would draw its limbs into its shell,
sn1.17:3.2: so a monk should— the thoughts of his heart.
sn1.17:3.4: totally unbound, he shouldn’t disparage anyone at all.
